summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WellTrack Phase 5: Tenant-scoped file storage, Onboarding update, and Impersonation. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 5 - Tenant-scoped photos: POST /api/students/{id}/photo correctly stores files in /app/backend/uploads/{slug}/student_photos/
Phase 5 - Photo URL format: /api/student-photos/{slug}/{filename} (dynamic route, NOT StaticFiles)
Phase 5 - DELETE /api/students/{id}/photo removes photo file from tenant-scoped directory
Phase 5 - GET /api/backups lists tenant-scoped backups correctly
Phase 5 - POST /api/backups/trigger creates backup in tenant-scoped directory
Onboarding - GET /api/onboarding/status returns complete based on onboarding_complete flag (not user count)
Onboarding - POST /api/onboarding/school-setup requires auth and only sets school settings
Onboarding - Frontend OnboardingPage correctly skips Step 1 (admin account creation) when user is logged in
Impersonation - POST /api/superadmin/schools/{school_id}/impersonate returns token starting with 'imp_'
Impersonation - GET /api/auth/impersonate?token=... creates session and redirects to dashboard
Impersonation - Invalid/expired/used tokens are correctly rejected with error redirect
Impersonation - SA School Detail page has 'Impersonate' button (data-testid='sa-impersonate-btn')
Impersonation - Feature Flags card visible on SA School Detail page with all 4 toggles
Settings > Data tab shows Automatic Daily Backups section with 'Run Now' button and backup list
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo school data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully verified: (1) Tenant-scoped photos stored at /app/backend/uploads/{slug}/student_photos/; (2) Tenant-scoped backups at /app/backend/uploads/{slug}/backups/; (3) Onboarding skips Step 1 for logged-in users; (4) Impersonation flow: SA creates token via POST /api/superadmin/schools/{id}/impersonate, school validates via GET /api/auth/impersonate?token=X; (5) SA School Detail page has Impersonate button and Feature Flags card. All existing features (login, dashboard, settings, students) continue to work correctly.
passed_tests: TestTenantScopedPhotos::test_upload_student_photo - Photo upload stores in tenant-scoped dir
TestTenantScopedPhotos::test_serve_student_photo - Photo served correctly from tenant-scoped dir
TestImpersonation::test_used_token_rejected - Used tokens rejected on second use
Frontend: Demo school login and dashboard load correctly
Frontend: SA login and School Detail page with Impersonate button
Frontend: Feature Flags card visible on SA School Detail page
Frontend: Students page and Student Profile page work correctly
Frontend: Settings > Data tab shows Automatic Daily Backups with Run Now button
